vc_checking.summary: All three cleaned manual obligations are semantically provable under the current recursive circular doubly-linked-list specification. The entail witness is a direct unfolding of circular_dll. The two return witnesses share the classification first = sentinel iff nodes = nil, derivable by case analysis on circular_dll_chain while preserving the owned sentinel fields and chain.

vc_shape.pre_exists: Unfolding circular_dll exposes first and last.
vc_shape.post_spatial: The sentinel node_next cell, sentinel node_prev cell, and circular_dll_chain first linklist_pre linklist_pre last nodes.
vc_shape.post_exists: Instantiate generated existentials last and first with the witnesses exposed by circular_dll.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Select either identical generated disjunct, unfold circular_dll, extract its first and last, and instantiate the post existentials in generated order as last and first.
witnesses.space_plan: After unfolding circular_dll, all three post resources are exactly the precondition resources and cancel without mutation.
witnesses.pure_plan: No pure reasoning or arithmetic is required.
witnesses.refinement_plan: Not applicable; this is a direct predicate unfold.
witnesses.failure_signal: None; Q is definitionally the body of circular_dll.
witnesses.grouping_reason: Uses the same circular_dll/circular_dll_chain fold-unfold family as both return witnesses.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: Sentinel node_next |-> first, sentinel node_prev |-> last, and circular_dll_chain first sentinel sentinel last nodes.
vc_shape.pre_exists: Any next address is internal to a nonempty circular_dll_chain constructor.
vc_shape.post_spatial: circular_dll sentinel nodes over exactly the same sentinel cells and chain.
vc_shape.post_exists: Fold circular_dll with current first and last.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Select the full first disjunct and instantiate circular_dll's first/last witnesses with the current first/last.
witnesses.space_plan: Apply the empty-classification helper to the current sentinel fields and chain, retain the spatial frame, then fold circular_dll with first and last.
witnesses.pure_plan: The helper gives first = sentinel iff nodes = nil. If nodes were nil, the nil-to-first direction would contradict PreH1; hence nodes <> nil. The equality 0 = 0 is reflexive.

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: forall sentinel first last nodes, sentinel.next |-> first ** sentinel.prev |-> last ** circular_dll_chain first sentinel sentinel last nodes |-- pure (first = sentinel <-> nodes = nil)

premises.premise: Ownership of both sentinel fields and circular_dll_chain first sentinel sentinel last nodes.
premises.discharged_by: Exactly the three spatial conjuncts in P.
premises.spatial_resource: For nodes=nil, simplification yields first=sentinel. For nodes=node::rest, simplification yields first=node and node<>sentinel, hence first<>sentinel; the list is definitionally nonempty.

premise_discharge: Every helper spatial premise is a literal conjunct of P.
PreH1 supplies first <> sentinel; no extra length, allocation, or arithmetic premise is required.
witnesses.failure_signal: None; the required nonemptiness follows from the chain definition and branch guard.
witnesses.grouping_reason: Shares one classification helper and the same circular_dll fold with return_wit_2.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: Sentinel node_next |-> first, sentinel node_prev |-> last, and circular_dll_chain first sentinel sentinel last nodes.
vc_shape.pre_exists: Any next address is internal to a nonempty circular_dll_chain constructor.
vc_shape.post_spatial: circular_dll sentinel nodes over exactly the same resources.
vc_shape.post_exists: Fold circular_dll with current first and last.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Select the full first disjunct and instantiate circular_dll's first/last witnesses with the current first/last.
witnesses.space_plan: Apply the same classification helper while retaining all spatial resources, then fold circular_dll.
witnesses.pure_plan: Combine PreH1 with the first=sentinel-to-nil direction of the helper to obtain nodes=nil. The equality 1=1 is reflexive.

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: The same circular_dll_chain front-pointer/empty-list classification listed for return_wit_1.

premises.premise: Owned sentinel next/prev fields plus circular_dll_chain first sentinel sentinel last nodes.
premises.discharged_by: The complete spatial precondition of this witness.
premises.spatial_resource: The nil constructor yields first=sentinel; the cons constructor explicitly yields node<>sentinel together with first=node.

premise_discharge: Every helper spatial premise occurs directly in P.
witnesses.failure_signal: None; first=sentinel excludes the nonempty chain constructor by its explicit node<>sentinel conjunct.
witnesses.grouping_reason: Same classification helper and fold pattern as return_wit_1.

analysis_groups.shared_proof_pattern: Unfold or fold circular_dll around the same sentinel fields and circular_dll_chain; derive the return branch facts from a single front-pointer/empty-list classification.
analysis_groups.shared_space_plan: All witnesses preserve the same sentinel next/prev cells and chain.
analysis_groups.shared_pure_plan: The return witnesses derive nodes<>nil or nodes=nil from first<>sentinel or first=sentinel using the same equivalence.
candidate_helper_declarations: circular_dll_front_empty_iff with the group-id suffix required by the group handoff
analysis_groups.grouping_reason: All three witnesses belong to one function, share one representation predicate/helper family, and the group size 3 is within the bound 12.

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: Entail pure(first = sentinel <-> nodes = nil) from the owned sentinel next/prev fields and circular_dll_chain first sentinel sentinel last nodes.
candidate_helper_declarations.destination: group-local case_lib; declaration name must end with this group's helper_namespace suffix

proof_groups.proof_strategy: First prove the group-suffixed classification helper by destructing nodes and simplifying circular_dll_chain: nil gives first=sentinel, while cons gives first=node and node<>sentinel. Prove the entail witness by unfolding circular_dll and cancellation. For each return witness apply the helper, derive the branch fact from PreH1, discharge the reflexive return equality, and fold circular_dll with first/last.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_empty_rec_enta: Select an identical disjunct, unfold circular_dll, expose first/last, instantiate generated last/first, and cancel.
per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_empty_rec_retu: Select the full disjunct; helper plus first<>sentinel gives nodes<>nil; prove 0=0 and fold circular_dll.
Select the full disjunct; helper plus first=sentinel gives nodes=nil; prove 1=1 and fold circular_dll.

premise_discharge.return_wit_1_branch_fact: PreH1 first<>sentinel plus the helper equivalence.
premise_discharge.return_wit_2_branch_fact: PreH1 first=sentinel plus the helper equivalence.

proof_groups.grouping_reason: The three targets share one function and the same circular_dll/circular_dll_chain fold-unfold pattern; the two nontrivial targets share one helper. One group minimizes worker overhead and contains 3 witnesses, within max_witnesses_per_group=12.

controller_simple_repairs.reason: vc-checking report included an inline group_plan but the default group_plan.json artifact was missing

source_goal_version.digest_input_policy: relative_path+sha256+state+role over generated files and witness statements
